# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def process_image
    require 'open-uri'
    
    image_url = params[:image_url]
    output_format = params[:format] || 'jpg'
    output_size = params[:size] || '600x600'

    # Download the image to a temporary file
    temp_file = open(image_url)
    input_path = "/tmp/input_image.#{File.extname(temp_file.path)}"
    File.open(input_path, 'wb') { |f| f.write(temp_file.read) }

    output_path = "/tmp/output_image.#{output_format}"

    # Call ImageMagick's convert command
    system("convert #{input_path} -resize #{output_size} #{output_path}")

    send_file(output_path, type: "image/#{output_format}", disposition: 'inline')

    # Clean up temporary files
    File.delete(input_path, output_path)
  end
end
